The '''''Empress''-class space station''' was a military [[Space station/Legends|space station]] model.

==Characteristics==
The ''Empress''-class was a deployable deep space and orbital facility designed to carry [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] and provide docking space for small [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]]. It's habitable areas were located in the central disk, out from which stretched the three landing and launching causeways. Its standard armament was ten [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] batteries and six [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], and it had hangar space for up to three starfighter [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]].<ref name="TCSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
The cover illustration of [[X-Wing: The Krytos Trap|''The Krytos Trap'']] indicates that the ''Empress''-class space station bears a strong resemblance to the [[XQ2 Platform|XQ2]] and [[XQ5 Platform]]s, though it appears significantly larger.
